entry.title: Policy Incentives for Pharmaceutical Innovation
entry.quote: Our reduced form and structural findings suggest that market exclusivity—especially if targeted to high-social-value, low-market-return areas—can be an effective tool for realigning incentives and stimulating innovation

entry.title: FDA described as a “clown show” amid latest scandal; top drug regulator is out
entry.quote: An alleged extortion attempt, a petty yearslong grudge, shocking social media posts, and ominous text messages make up the latest scandal at the Food and Drug Administration, an agency that industry outsiders are calling a “clown show” and “soap opera” amid the Trump administration’s leadership

entry.title: New York school phone ban has made lunch loud again
entry.quote: These days, lunchtime at Benjamin N. Cardozo High School in Queens is a boisterous affair, a far cry from before the smartphone ban went into effect, when most students spent their spare time scrolling and teachers said you could hear a pin drop.

entry.title: I'm a Linux
entry.quote: I bought my first Mac in 2004 because it seemed different and provided a better way to work. In 2023 it’s why I choose Linux. Yes, these days that makes me a crazy-one, a misfit, a rebel, a troublemaker. I’m a Linux.

entry.title: Tape containing UNIX v4 found
entry.quote: While cleaning a storage room, our staff found this tape containing #UNIX v4 from Bell Labs, circa 1973
